text:
in this variable with a value of 1 or greater. 

SHORT NAME: DAWPS_CD 

LONG NAME: DAW_PROD_SLCTN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: 0 = No Product Selection Indicated (may also have missing values) 
1 = Substitution Not Allowed by Prescriber 
2 = Substitution Allowed — Patient Requested That Brand Product Be Dispensed 
3 = Substitution Allowed — Pharmacist Selected Product Dispensed 
4 = Substitution Allowed — Generic Drug Not in Stock 
5 = Substitution Allowed — Brand Drug
